description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and living spaces, all arranged around a central hallway. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The interior is finished with light-colored flooring and blue-tiled bathrooms, while wooden doors and cabinetry add warmth and contrast. The structure includes several entry points, with a main entrance leading into a spacious living area and secondary doors opening to other rooms. The roof is flat, contributing to a modern, streamlined appearance. The overall design emphasizes functionality, comfort, and accessibility, making it suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white exterior walls, large windows, flat roof, and blue-tiled bathrooms, featuring wood accents and a spacious, functional layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, central hallway, and open living area, with blue-tiled bathrooms and wood accents visible throughout.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear rooms and secondary entrances are visible, along with additional blue-tiled bathrooms and a clear view of the kitchen and dining area.
description_view_2: This perspective showcases the front facade with the main entry doors, central living space, and a balanced arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side rooms, including bedrooms and bathrooms, and provides a clear look at the living area and secondary access points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
